data.title: Lassonde Industries Inc. appoints Francis Trudeau as Executive VP Finance; to become CFO on May 19, 2026. Éric Gemme retiring on June 19, 2026.
data.description: In Rougemont, Quebec, on February 19, 2026, Lassonde Industries Inc. (TSX: LAS.A) revealed the selection of Francis Trudeau as the new Executive Vice-President Finance, effective March 16, 2026. This decision is part of a planned leadership shift that will see Mr. Trudeau taking on the role of Chief Financial Officer on May 19, 2026. He will be taking over from Éric Gemme, who is set to retire from Lassonde on June 19, 2026. It has been disclosed earlier that Mr. Gemme will be actively involved in the transition process to assist Mr. Trudeau smoothly integrate into his new position.

data.title: Boardwalk REIT's strong performance in 2025 with increased distribution by 11.1%, FFO per Unit of $1.20 for Q4 2025, NOI of $108.5 million, Same Property NOI of $102.5 million, and occupancy at 97.6% in Q4 2025. Introduction of 2026 guidance with FFO range of $4.65 to $4.90 per Unit. Completed dispositions and acquisitions for a net gain, affirming financial health and growth opportunities.
data.description: Boardwalk Real Estate Investment Trust reported strong financial performance for the three and twelve-month periods ending December 31, 2025. In Q4 2025, Funds From Operations (FFO) was $1.20 per unit, a 11.1% increase from Q4 2024, with a Net Operating Income (NOI) of $108.5 million and Same Property NOI of $102.5 million. For the twelve months ending December 31, 2025, FFO per unit was $4.65, reflecting an 11.2% increase from the previous year. The Trust achieved a Profit of $196.9 million during this period.Noteworthy figures for Q4 2025 include a 4.5% increase in same property rental revenue from a year ago, an occupancy rate of 97.6%, and an average occupied rent of $1,590. The Trust completed dispositions of non-core communities, totaling 1,382 suites with gross proceeds of $277.6 million and acquisitions of newer communities totaling 1,376 suites for $551.5 million in 2025. Boardwalk REIT also introduced its 2026 financial guidance and increased its regular monthly distribution to $1.80 per trust unit on an annualized basis.The Trust's strong and flexible balance sheet indicates approximately $466.0 million in total available liquidity at the end of the quarter, with 96% of mortgages carrying CMHC-insurance. Despite a loss of $50.8 million for the year ended December 31, 2025, the Trust's Debt to EBITDA ratio improved from 10.08x in 2024 to 9.99x in 2025, with Debt to Total Assets at 42.3% compared to 40.6% in 2024. Boardwalk REIT is optimistic about 2026, focusing on disciplined cash flow compounding for Unitholders and enhancing its operational efficiency and decision-making processes through new technologies.

data.title: Dow drops amid U.S.-Iran tensions, Warren Buffett's Berkshire holding rises; Carvana stock plunges on earnings.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to ongoing tensions between the U.S. and Iran regarding the nuclear situation. Carvana stock took a significant hit following their earnings report. On the other hand, Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway holdings saw a substantial increase. The market continues to react to the uncertainties caused by the U.S.-Iran standoff, with investors closely monitoring the situation. Overall, the stock market experienced fluctuations with the Dow Jones dropping, Carvana stock plunging, and Berkshire Hathaway holdings soaring amid the geopolitical concerns.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile will give a quarterly business update on March 2, 2026 at 5:00 pm (Eastern Time), including Q&A with shareholders.
data.description: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. revealed plans to host a quarterly business update conference call on Monday, March 2nd at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). The company, traded as NASDAQ: ASTS, is developing the initial space-based cellular broadband network accessible by regular smartphones. This network is intended for commercial and government use. During the call, AST SpaceMobile will answer inquiries from both retail and institutional shareholders along with management.

data.title: Endurance Gold reveals $8M LIFE private placement for flow-through units and regular units.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion people. The data shows that there are now over 1.2 billion mobile phone subscriptions worldwide. Additionally, over 4.5 billion individuals now have access to the internet, representing a significant increase in digital connectivity. The report also highlights that global carbon dioxide emissions have reached over 33 billion metric tons, underscoring the pressing need for environmental action. Moreover, the study reveals that the global economy has experienced a growth rate of 2.3% in the past year, with the total world GDP now exceeding $85 trillion. These statistics demonstrate the ever-evolving landscape of our world in terms of population, technology, environment, and economy.

data.title: Newmont (NEM) reports Q4 earnings, beating estimates. Earnings at $2.52 per share, revenue $6.82B, up from $5.65B last year.
data.description: Newmont Corp. (NYSE: NEM) saw its shares remain mostly unchanged in the after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of its Q4 earnings report, surpassing expectations on both the top and bottom lines. The company reported quarterly earnings of $2.52 per share, beating the consensus estimate of $2 by 25.94%. Quarterly revenue stood at $6.82 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $6.16 billion and marking an increase from $5.65 billion in the same period last year. In terms of production figures for Q4, attributable gold production rose by 2% to 1,453,000 ounces compared to the previous quarter. This uptick was driven by the addition of new, low-cost ounces at Ahafo North, along with higher grades at Tanami and Merian.

data.title: Energy Transfer LP filed its 2025 annual report on Form 10-K with SEC, accessible on its website.
data.description: Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) has submitted its annual report for the year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the SEC. The company offers these reports on its website, www.energytransfer.com, including Form 10-K for annual reports, Form 10-Q for quarterly reports, and Form 8-K for current reports, along with other details furnished to or filed with the SEC. Energy Transfer is ready to issue printed copies of its reports to any unitholder who requests one.

data.title: Gran Tierra Energy signed a production sharing agreement with SOCAR for the Guba-Khazaryani region in Azerbaijan.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 19, 2026, Gran Tierra Energy Inc. disclosed that it has entered into an Exploration, Development, and Production Sharing Agreement (EDPSA) for the Guba-Khazaryani region in Azerbaijan. The agreement, signed by a subsidiary of Gran Tierra, involves cooperation with the State Oil Company of the Republic of Azerbaijan and covers the onshore Contract Area. Gran Tierra Energy Inc., trading on NYSE American: GTE, TSX: GTE, and LSE: GTE, expressed their satisfaction with this recent development.

data.title: Dream Office REIT reports Q4 2025 results with a conference call scheduled for Feb 20, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. Total properties undisclosed.
data.description: In Toronto, Dream Office Real Estate Investment Trust (D.UN-TSX) unveiled its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. A discussion on these figures is scheduled for Friday, February 20, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. (ET). Operational highlights as of December 31, 2025, versus September 30, 2025, and December 31, 2024, include details on total properties. The Trust's management will delve into further details during the upcoming call.

data.title: Seagate closed exchanges with holders of $600M in exchangeable notes, receiving $599.2M in cash.
data.description: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX) and its subsidiary Seagate HDD Cayman revealed the completion of privately negotiated exchanges on February 19, 2026. The exchanges involved $600 million principal amount of Seagate HDD’s 3.50% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028. In exchange, they received around $599.2 million in cash.

data.title: Fairfax India Holdings Corp. reports 2025 net earnings of $410.5 million ($3.05 per share) from a loss in 2024. Book value per share rises 9.4% to $22.94.
data.description: Fairfax India Holdings Corporation (TSX: FIH.U) has reported a significant turnaround in its financial performance for the fiscal year 2025. The company recorded net earnings of $410.5 million, equivalent to $3.05 per diluted share. This marks a stark improvement from the previous fiscal year, which saw a net loss of $41.2 million ($0.30 net loss per diluted share). The company's book value per share also saw a notable uptick, increasing by 9.4% to $22.94 as of December 31, 2025, compared to $20.96 at the end of 2024. The rise in book value was primarily driven by net gains on investments, although this was partially offset by unrealized foreign currency translation losses due to the depreciation of the Indian rupee against the U.S. dollar throughout 2025.

data.title: Centerra Gold declares C$0.07/share quarterly dividend totaling approx C$14M (~US$10.2M); payable on March 26, 2026.
data.description: Centerra Gold Inc. (TSX: CG) (NYSE: CGAU) declared a quarterly dividend of C$0.07 per common share, totaling around C$14.0 million or US$10.2 million. The dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, will be disbursed on March 26, 2026, to shareholders on record as of March 12, 2026. This dividend is considered an eligible dividend for Canadian income tax objectives.

data.title: Veracyte, Inc. (Nasdaq: VCYT) will attend Raymond James 47th Institutional Investors Conf. on 3rd, and Leerink Partners Global Health Conf. on 9th.
data.description: Veracyte, Inc., a top cancer diagnostics company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol VCYT, has disclosed its upcoming participation in key investor conferences. These include the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference in Orlando, FL, where a presentation will be held on March 3rd at 8:05 a.m. Eastern Time, and the Leerink Partners Global Health Conference in Miami, FL, featuring a fireside chat on March 9th at 10:40 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can access live audio webcasts of the company’s presentations.

data.title: Copart stock drops after Q2 earnings report misses estimates: $1.12 billion revenue, 36 cents per share.
data.description: Shares of Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) plummeted during after-hours trading following the release of their second-quarter earnings report, which fell short of expectations both in terms of revenue and earnings. For the quarter, Copart reported earnings of 36 cents per share, failing to meet the estimated 40 cents per share. Additionally, their quarterly revenue stood at $1.12 billion, below the projected figures. Investors are advised to monitor CPRT stock as it reacts to this news. For more in-depth information, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EcoSynthetix reported Q4 2025 net sales of $5.9M, a 9% increase, and FY 2025 sales of $20.8M, a 12% rise. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $0.5M, up $0.4M, and for FY 2025 was $0.4M, up $1.3M. They won 2 new commercial accounts in Europe and achieved climate positive operations in 2025, avoiding over 125% of the company's carbon emissions. They maintained a strong balance sheet with $29.6M cash and term deposits as of December 31, 2025. CEO Jeff MacDonald mentioned broadening their reach in key markets and achieving strong growth.
data.description: EcoSynthetix Inc., a renewable chemicals company, reported its financial results for Q4 2025 and FY 2025. Net sales were $5.9 million in Q4 2025 (up 9%) and $20.8 million for FY 2025 (up 12%). Adjusted EBITDA was $0.5 million in Q4 2025 and $0.4 million for FY 2025. The company acquired two new commercial accounts in Europe in Q4 2025, with eight new mills adopting its products in 2025. EcoSynthetix achieved climate positive operations in 2025. They maintained a strong balance sheet with $29.6 million in cash and term deposits. Adjusted EBITDA was $0.5 million for Q4 2025 and $0.4 million for FY 2025. Net income was $0.2 million in Q4 2025 and a net loss of $0.4 million for FY 2025. The company will host a conference call on Feb 20. EcoSynthetix offers sustainable biopolymers and is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange.
